metadataSupplemented.reason: The provided Open Textbook Library cache is incomplete and reports the target textbook page as not found. Local metadata identified the representative textbooks and their role; public publisher catalogue pages were checked for lightweight title/context confirmation.
items: Confirmed the entry is discipline-level Operations Research rather than one complete local book text.
Used local metadata naming Hillier & Lieberman and Hamdy A. Taha as representative textbook sources.
Checked public McGraw Hill and Pearson catalogue pages for representative-title context.
Did not use or quote proprietary textbook text.
